name: Open Telemark and Cross Hesitation
preceding_figure_names: Closed Change RF, Closed Wing, Double Reverse Spin, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Hesitation Change, Reverse Pivot, Reverse Turn, Wing
following_figure_names: Chasse From Promenade Position, Weave From Promenade Position, Cross Hesitation, Wing, Left Whisk
notes: Note: Cross Hesitation can be used from other positions and can be overturned. If overturned, RF position will be "fwd and across". There is no foot swivel on step 4 unless cross hesitation is overturned. Normal ending is stepping back with Lady outside.

steps.action: Step forward DC, start turn left, sway S, CBM, rise e/o 1
Step to side BDW, T, 1/4 between 1-2, sway L, up
Step to side and slightly forward in PP, pointing DW, body facing wall, TH, 1/2 between 2-3, sway S, up, lower e/o 3
Step back BDC, start turn left, sway S, CBM, rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
Close to RF (Heel Turn), FLOD, HT, 3/8 between 1-2, sway S, cont rise on 2
RF diagonal forward in PP, R side leading, pointing LOD, TH, slight body turn to L, sway S, up, lower e/o 3
